name: refactory
description: Disciplined, behavior-preserving code refactoring. A catalog of 61 named refactorings with step-by-step mechanics, a code-smell trigger table, and a safety discipline (test after every small step, revert on red, never mix refactoring with feature changes). Ships a self-arming guarded mode, a surfaced-bug fix phase, and a cross-session learning loop. Proactively flags smells while you read or edit code.
